problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: If Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus is applied to without, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
